reviews.name: Oliver Knezevic
reviews.text:
Sehr schöner Aufenthalt am Meer – Erholung pur am Mucobega Beach

Wir hatten einen wundervollen Aufenthalt in diesem liebevoll geführten kleinen Hotel am Rande von Saranda, direkt am Mucobega Beach.

Besonders begeistert hat uns der eigene Meerzugang – das Wasser ist kristallklar und perfekt zum Schwimmen. Die Zimmer sind modern, sehr sauber und bieten einen atemberaubenden Blick aufs Meer – bis hinüber nach Korfu. Es war jeden Tag eine Freude, diesen Ausblick zu genießen.

Die ruhige Lage sorgt für pure Entspannung, und wer etwas Trubel sucht, erreicht die Promenade von Saranda in etwa 40 Minuten zu Fuß .

Das Hotel wird von einer herzlichen Gastgeberfamilie geführt, die ihren Gästen jeden Wunsch von den Augen abliest. Das Frühstück ist abwechslungsreich, frisch und wechselt täglich, sodass immer etwas Neues zu entdecken ist. Auch das Abendessen, das wir zweimal genossen haben, war ausgesprochen lecker und qualitativ gut.

Wir möchten uns herzlich bei der Betreiberfamilie für die Gastfreundschaft, Aufmerksamkeit und warme Atmosphäre bedanken, die unseren Aufenthalt so besonders gemacht haben.
reviews.textTranslated:
A very nice stay by the sea – pure relaxation at Mucobega Beach

We had a wonderful stay in this lovingly run small hotel on the outskirts of Saranda, right on Mucobega Beach.

We were particularly impressed by the private sea access – the water is crystal clear and perfect for swimming. The rooms are modern, very clean, and offer breathtaking views of the sea – all the way to Corfu. It was a joy to enjoy this view every day.

The quiet location ensures pure relaxation, and those seeking a bit of hustle and bustle can reach Saranda's promenade in about a 40-minute walk.

The hotel is run by a welcoming host family who anticipate their guests' every need. The breakfast is varied, fresh, and changes daily, so there's always something new to discover. The dinner, which we enjoyed twice, was also extremely delicious and of high quality.

We would like to sincerely thank the family that runs the hotel for their hospitality, attentiveness, and warm atmosphere, which made our stay so special.

Michelin class. Fine cooking with great creativity, joy and friendly service.
Mike, the owner and chef, is well travelled who speaks excellent English and glad to explain about the dishes.
Trust me that you'll ask for explanations, because some of his creations are not ones you've tasted elsewhere.
The most brilliant was the cauliflower steak (vegetarian). It had creamy sauce made of cauliflower and hazelnuts. Even more spectacular was the green mouse on the plate. We mistaken it with avocado, but in fact it was prepared of peas with cream. Hard to understand how they reached such perfect texture. The dish was accompanied by a tasty salad of arugula and nectarines.
You shouldn't miss it!

reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you for sharing your feedback. We are sorry to hear that your experience did not meet your expectations. However, we work every day to provide fresh, high-quality food prepared carefully by our professional kitchen staff.

Our pizzeria is known for good customer service, hospitality, and respect toward every guest, which is why your comment about the staff surprised us. We continuously train our team to ensure every customer feels welcomed and treated professionally.

In addition, we offer a comfortable atmosphere, special services for families, events, and reservations, aiming to make every visit enjoyable and memorable.

We take every review seriously, but we also believe that one experience does not represent the overall quality and standards appreciated by many of our loyal customers every day.
The statement that you mentioned about the onwer being rude, is a total misinformation. Not only the owner was not present during this period due to a great management team cooperating and interfering  with the work circumstances.

While we always welcome constructive feedback, we also believe that respectful communication goes both ways. Our staff do their utmost to provide a warm and professional service, and we kindly ask that all guests treat them with the same courtesy.

We wish you all the best and hope your future dining experiences are more exciting.

reviewContext.Noise level: Loud, but you can still talk

reviews.name: Jurgen Beqiri
reviews.text:
Had an amazing experience at Pizzeri Restaurant Lindi during my vacation in Albania! As someone coming from New York, I take pizza seriously, and I can honestly say this was one of the best pizzas I’ve had in my life. The dough was perfect, the ingredients tasted fresh, and every bite was incredible.

What made the experience even better was the warm hospitality. It’s a family-owned business, and the owners made us feel so welcome from the moment we walked in. You can really feel the passion and care they put into both the food and the atmosphere.

I highly recommend this place to every tourist visiting Albania. If you’re looking for amazing pizza, friendly people, and a memorable dining experience, this is the spot to visit! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 🇺🇸🇺🇸🇦🇱🇦🇱

Thank you very much for your kind words! 😊
We are very happy that you enjoyed the salad, the fish, and the peaceful atmosphere at Taverna Rrapo. It means a lot to us that you appreciated our service and value as well. We hope to welcome you again soon for another relaxing and delicious meal! 🐟🥗

reviews.name: Lars Mikuta
reviews.text: Had a fantastic dinner, salad with fruit, amazing stuffed peppers and gilthead bream , beers , water , coffee and an excellent homemade raki on the house. Staff was super nice. It was simply brilliant and all for a cost of 35 euro. Thank you Taverna Rrapo 😁😁😁

reviews.name: Sabrina S.
reviews.text: Wir haben uns hier vom ersten Moment an sehr wohlgefühlt. Das Personal war unglaublich freundlich und aufmerksam, sodass man sich direkt willkommen fühlt. Besonders bemerkenswert: Wir waren an zwei verschiedenen Tagen hier – was für uns eigentlich sehr untypisch ist, da wir normalerweise immer neue Restaurants ausprobieren möchten. Aber es hat uns so gut gefallen, dass wir gerne wiedergekommen sind. An beiden Tagen haben wir unterschiedliche Gerichte probiert und jedes einzelne war wirklich sehr lecker. Auch das Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis war absolut top. Dieses Restaurant können wir definitiv weiterempfehlen!
reviews.textTranslated: We felt very comfortable here from the very first moment. The staff was incredibly friendly and attentive, making us feel instantly welcome. What's particularly noteworthy is that we visited on two different days – which is quite unusual for us, as we normally prefer to try new restaurants. But we enjoyed it so much that we were happy to return. On both days, we tried different dishes, and every single one was absolutely delicious. The value for money was also excellent. We can definitely recommend this restaurant!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for your beautiful words! We are truly happy to hear that you felt comfortable and welcomed from the very first moment. It means a lot to us that you chose to come back a second time — especially when you usually like trying different restaurants. That is one of the biggest compliments we could receive.
We’re delighted that you enjoyed all the different dishes you tried and appreciated the service and value as well. Your recommendation means a great deal to our whole team. We hope to welcome you again soon at Taverna Rrapo

Дуже вдячні команді закладу за високу кухню і підтримку албанських звичаїв у всьому: від страв до орнаментів 💛💙
reviews.textTranslated:
We ended our evening in Saranda in this wonderful restaurant and we were not mistaken. Thank you to our hostess named Alexia for her care and support in this wonderful journey into the world of Albanian flavors and delicacies.
We are very grateful to the team of the establishment for the haute cuisine and support of Albanian customs in everything: from dishes to ornaments 💛💙

reviews.textTranslated: I arrived after reading the reviews, unfortunately there is no connection between the reviews and the food served. 14 unfresh, boring, supermarket-level mazats, a fish the size of a large sardine, tasteless, lamb chops that are more reminiscent of dry chicken, the dishes arrive cold and prepared in advance. In summary, disappointing food from Mand, not tasty, not fresh and not authentic and at an expensive price. The place is beautiful but did not provide a good dining experience.

Der Sohn des Hauses kann übrigens perfekt deutsch - ein Rückkehrer.
reviews.textTranslated:
We were just passing through and therefore only stopped at this taverna, which we highly recommend.

For dinner, we had a delicious salad with herbs, followed by sea bream and bass (I can't remember the German name right now), wonderfully grilled with a few small potatoes... absolutely delicious.

The owner's son, by the way, speaks perfect German – he's a returning resident.

reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Dear Luca

We carefull read your review and for a moment we thought you had spent your holidays in a horror camp rather than in our tourist structure.
Speakinng abaout bedbugs that you never actually saw, but only "imagined" is quite a creative way of inventing problems where none exist, it is hardly our fault if a random personal itch seemed to you like an "insect attack"
Regardin brekfast, we ate sorry that saltiness of traditional Albaniancheese turned into sucha major trauma for you.
Coffee is neverfree in  Europe, but perhaps you confused our hotel with your home kithcen.
As for the staff the young ladies who served you are polite, smiling, and speak several foreing languages, it is certainly not their dytu to master "street Italian" at the. Whim of every tourist.
 About the stirs: if walking up rwo flight felt a life threateningrisk, then next time it may be wiser to book a facility with an elevator, or. Better yet, a rehabilitation clinic.
We never adverrtise ourselves as a chidren's resort, but as a clean and quiet place for holidays something which, fortunately, the vast majority of our guests highly appreciate..
In the end, we know verywell that not every tourist is pleasant, but unfortunately, this rewius says nothing about our structure, and everything abaout your own preception. And that, sadly, is the only harsh  reality.


Respectfully management
Ep

title: Demi Hotel
description: Streamlined rooms, some with sea views, in a relaxed hotel offering a beachfront restaurant & a bar.
hotelDescription:
This relaxed hotel facing the Ionian Sea in an area surrounded by beachfront bars and cafes is 2 km from Saranda Ferry Terminal for boats to Corfu Island. It's also 3 km from Lëkurësi Castle with sweeping views and an airy eatery.
 Streamlined rooms with a modern vibe offer Wi-Fi access and flat-screen TVs, plus minibars and safes. All have en suite bathrooms. Upgraded rooms feature sofabeds and balconies with sea views. Room service is available.
 Breakfast (fee) is offered. Other amenities include a beachfront restaurant serving Mediterranean cuisine, and a lively bar with a resident DJ. Parking is available.

reviews.name: Enes Beqari
reviews.text:
Stafi është shumë i sjellshëm dhe mikpritës, gjë që e bën eksperiencën më të këndshme. Parkimi është i mirë dhe i lehtë për t’u aksesuar. Mëngjesi është shumë i mirë, do ta vlerësoja 10/10.
Megjithatë, ka disa mangësi që duhen përmirësuar. Dhoma është relativisht e vogël për çmimin që paguhet. Gjithashtu, duket që disa gjëra janë lënë pas dore: kur përdoret uji në katet e sipërme dëgjohet zhurmë në tubacione, ndërsa në dhomat 303 dhe 304 kaseta e banjos ka rrjedhje.
Pastrimi është në nivel të mirë (9/10), por do të ishte mirë të kushtohej më shumë vëmendje detajeve si pluhuri. Një tjetër problem janë peshqirët – edhe pse të larë, kanë njolla që nuk janë hequr dhe nuk janë aq të butë sa pritet për një hotel të këtij niveli. Gjithashtu, vendi ku vendosen peshqirët ka dëmtime nga lagështira.
Sugjerime për përmirësim:
Varesja metalike e rrobave në ballkon është e ndryshkur dhe do të ishte mirë të zëvendësohej me një plastike.
Tek ekspresi i kafesë duhet të vendoset ujë për çdo klient të ri; makina ishte bosh dhe me mbetje pluhuri.
Parkimi do të përmirësohej me vijëzime më të qarta dhe vendosjen e një pasqyre sigurie, duke qenë se është malore dhe ka dalje të kufizuar në shikueshmëri.
Gjatë muajit mars po kryhen punime në bar për përgatitjen e sezonit, çka ndikon që ambienti të mos shijohet maksimalisht.
Në përgjithësi, për raportin cilësi-çmim (mars 2026, jashtë sezoni), do ta vlerësoja me hater 8/10.
reviews.textTranslated:
The staff is very polite and welcoming, which makes the experience more pleasant. Parking is good and easy to access. The breakfast is very good, I would rate it 10/10.
However, there are some shortcomings that need to be improved. The room is relatively small for the price paid. Also, it seems that some things have been neglected: when using the water on the upper floors, there is a noise in the pipes, while in rooms 303 and 304 the bathroom cassette is leaking.
The cleaning is at a good level (9/10), but it would be good to pay more attention to details such as dust. Another problem is the towels - although washed, they have stains that have not been removed and are not as soft as expected for a hotel of this level. Also, the place where the towels are placed has moisture damage.
Suggestions for improvement:
The metal clothes hanger on the balcony is rusty and it would be good to replace it with a plastic one.
The coffee machine should be filled with water for each new customer; the machine was empty and dusty.
The parking lot could be improved with clearer markings and a safety mirror, as it is mountainous and has limited visibility.
During March, work is being carried out on the grass to prepare for the season, which means that the environment is not fully enjoyed.
Overall, for the quality-price ratio (March 2026, off-season), I would rate it a solid 8/10.

reviews.text:
We had such a great time staying at Hotel Sarandë — everything about our experience was just lovely. First of all, the location couldn’t be better — it’s right in the heart of the city, super close to the beach, promenade, shops, restaurants and all the main spots, but still quiet and peaceful enough to relax. It was so convenient to get around and explore everything easily.

What made our stay even more special was the amazing service. The staff were so warm, friendly and helpful from the moment we arrived until we checked out — they really made us feel welcome and took great care of us. They were always ready to help with any questions we had, gave us great tips about places to visit and things to do, and made sure everything we needed was taken care of promptly.
We will definitely come back next time we visit Sarandë, and we would absolutely recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a great place to stay — wonderful service, perfect location and great value for money! Thank you so much for your service..😊😊

reviews.name: Mel Rud
reviews.text: Die Lage am Meer ist das einzige das hier positiv bewertet werden kann. Die Zimmer sind winzig, man hat nicht mal richtig Platz für die geschlossenen Koffer, noch zum auspacken der Sachen die man täglich benötigt. Die Einrichtung ist minderwertig ebenso die Plastikbakonmöbel. Im Mülleimer war noch Müll von einem vorherigen Gast. Zimmerservice gibts scheinbar nicht auch wenn man vier Nächte dort verbringt. Der Gang zum Zimmer ist seit Tagen dreckig. Das Frühstück wechselt zwar tgl. ist aber auf keinen Fall dem Preis des Hotels (€170,-/Nacht) entspreched (am ersten Tag z.B. lieblos servierter geschmackloser Schinken-Käse-Toast) wenn man keinen Kaffee trinkt gibts nur Kamilletee in einer staubigen Kanne, Orangensaft (glaub ich zumindest) ist nur Zuckerwasser. Das Wasser in der Dusche ist meist kalt und wenn man was sagt wird man vom Hausherren nur unfreundlich behandelt. Seine Frau und ein Mädchen das hier ist und ein bisschen englisch spricht (auch dieses wird von ihm sehr unfreundlich behandelt) bemühen sich zwar aber es wirkt eher als könnte hier jeder ein Hotel eröffnen. Die Anlage ist insgesamt sehr ungepflegt überall stehen tote oder mit Läuse überfüllter Pflanzen herum, das öffentliche Klo ist wohl schon länger angesch****, die Polsterauflagen der zum Hotel gehörenden Strandliegen sind zum Teil verschlimmelt. Alles in allem kann ich dieses Hotel nicht empfehlen und es ist viiiiel zu teuer für das was man geboten bekommt.
reviews.textTranslated: The seaside location is the only positive aspect of this place. The rooms are tiny; there's barely enough space for closed suitcases, let alone unpacking the things you need daily. The furnishings are low-quality, including the plastic balcony furniture. There was still trash from a previous guest in the bin. Room service doesn't seem to exist, even for stays of four nights. The hallway to the room has been dirty for days. While the breakfast changes daily, it's definitely not worth the price of the hotel (€170 per night). For example, on the first day, a tasteless ham and cheese toast was served without any care. If you don't drink coffee, you only get chamomile tea in a dusty pot, and the orange juice (I think) is just sugar water. The shower water is usually cold, and if you complain, the owner is rude. His wife and a girl who's here and speaks a little English (he also treats her very rudely) try their best, but it feels like anyone could open a hotel here. The grounds are generally very neglected; dead plants or plants infested with aphids are lying around everywhere, the public toilet has clearly been soiled for a long time, and some of the cushions on the hotel's beach loungers are moldy. All in all, I can't recommend this hotel, and it's far too expensive for what you get.

title: Kalemi's Beachside Hotel Sarande
description: Unassuming rooms, some with beach views, in a casual hotel with a private beach & a restaurant.
hotelDescription:
This laid-back hotel is 1 km from Saranda ferry terminal and a 2-minute walk from the closest beach.
 Simple, down-to-earth rooms have flat-screen TVs, free Wi-Fi and minifridges, as well as balconies. Upgraded rooms provide beach views.
 Amenities include a relaxed regional restaurant and a bar. There’s also a private beach, a guest lounge and a furnished terrace. Bike rentals and BBQ facilities are available. Parking is available for a surcharge.

reviews.name: Sonja M
reviews.text: Dirty and hard mattresses, and the bed makes noises. An old bathroom with a very small shower, curtain where everything floods when you shower, and water mold in the grout. The owner is unfriendly to the staff and does not make a pleasant impression. In June 2025, a man, possibly Korean, wearing glasses worked there. He was there from early morning until late in the evening and seemed to be the person responsible for everything, breakfast, checking in guests, and renovating rooms. I felt very sorry for him. Breakfast is brought to the table, and the portions were very small. Apart from the view, the hotel was a complete disappointment. It also looked much nicer in the photos on the internet than it actually is.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: You have never stayed at our hotel, these are not pictures of our rooms. We don’t have Korean staff as well. It’s a pity you’re defaming a family business, it’s evident youre among our competitors.

reviews.text:
very low services and very low personal appeal:
the owners are liers and hiding a lot of important details which are missing from the reservation.
STAY FAR AWAY FROM THIS PROPERTY, YOU WILL RUIN YOUR VACATION!!!!!!!!!!!

I was in this hotel for 5 days and in the photos it is very pretty but in reality, it is quite different. The rooms are very dirty, the sheets are not changed, there were hairs on the bed. The wifi doesn't work properly and the bathroom doesn't even have a lock, which means that when you shower there is water everywhere.

The staff is very very unpleasant and blocked our access to breakfast!
The bathroom has no shower gel or shampoo and when we ask they tell us that it is a 3 star hotel and not 5 stars!
The towels are stained and very worn.

Frankly for the price of 70€ per night there are much better things in Albania!
I do not recommend this hotel if you can call it that.

reviews.text:
We had a wonderful stay at Mucobega Hotels. It is located in a calm and peaceful area away from the city crowd and has a beautiful private beach.

The breakfast was really tasty with many options to choose from. The hotel staff were very friendly and always quick to respond to our requests. They also have a caretaker, Jessy, who took great care of our son so that we could relax and enjoy our time at the beach.

One of the best parts was that the place was not crowded, so we had plenty of personal space and could truly unwind. The hotel also has a very nice restaurant where we tried most of the seafood dishes, and everything was delicious. Restaurant staff member Alex was especially friendly and always helpful.

We would definitely come again and highly recommend this hotel to our friends and family.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for your beautiful review and for taking the time to share your experience with us. We’re delighted to hear that you enjoyed the peaceful atmosphere, our private beach, and the chance to truly relax away from the city crowds.

It’s wonderful to know that you loved the breakfast selection and our seafood restaurant, and we truly appreciate your kind words about our team. Gesty will be especially happy to hear that she helped make your family’s stay even more enjoyable, and Alex will also be thrilled to know his friendly service made such a positive impression.

Creating a relaxing and welcoming experience for our guests is what we strive for every day, so your recommendation means a lot to us. We can’t wait to welcome you and your family back again soon!

title: Hotel Apollon
description: Modest beachfront getaway featuring free breakfast, plus a refined restaurant with a terrace.
hotelDescription:
Set in a breezy building, this relaxed beachfront hotel is 5 km from both the Bistricë river and the Lëkurësi Castle ruins.
 Straightforward rooms offering balconies with sea views provide Wi-Fi, minibars and satellite TV. Room service is available.
 Parking is complimentary. Other amenities include a polished restaurant with sea views and a terrace, plus a bar, and a private beach with umbrellas and sunloungers. Breakfast is available.

Saranda is a bit spread out, but getting there and back by car wasn't a big problem. The hotel is centrally located by the sea. If there's a free space, you can park under the roof; the rest of the parking lot is uncovered. The room is clean, and the staff are there until noon every day.

updatesFromCustomers.text:
Nice Beach, Disturbing Treatment of Pet Monkey – Authorities Should Intervene

I stayed at this hotel recently and while the private beach is undeniably beautiful, my experience was deeply overshadowed by what I witnessed involving their pet monkey.

The animal is kept on a leash and is constantly subjected to stressful interactions—not just from curious guests, but disturbingly, from the hotel staff themselves. I saw a waitress slap the monkey in the face, and staff members grabbing its arms and letting it dangle by the neck from the leash. It was extremely distressing to witness.

Using animals as attractions or mascots is unacceptable, especially when their well-being is compromised. What I saw was more than a lack of training—it was a clear disregard for basic animal welfare.

I urge travelers to think twice before supporting establishments that allow such treatment, and I sincerely hope that relevant animal protection authorities take notice.

Animals deserve respect, not to be entertainment props. The beach may be peaceful, but what happens behind the scenes is anything but.

reviews.name: Patricia van Eeckhoudt
reviews.text: We had a great stay in this familiy hotel ! We stayed 2 days. The beach is amazing ! For from the crowded center. They made a complete new beach. Just amazing. We were there out of season ! Very calm and had the whole beach for us. Amazing views ! The owner are very very friendly and helpful. Breakfast very good on our terrasse with seaview ! We will come back and wish them a great season !

reviews.name: Victor Freij
reviews.text:
The hotel is situated at the edge of town where a lot of development is still happening. This means that there are numerous construction sites in the area.

The hotel itself looks really new and is beautiful as is the view of the bay.

The rooms are clean and have a fresh coat of paint. The bathroom is luxurious-looking, but it may be a little cramped. The bed is decent, although a little short for me, I think it's only 180cm long or something along those lines. We did have a problem with our doorknob to the bathroom which came off and locked us out of the bathroom. But the staff was really helpful and fixed it for us.

Overall the hotel is nice, but I just can't shake the feeling that this hotel was built with cheap materials and shortcuts and therefore doesn't last long. This, along with the location in the middle of a construction site, is why I can't give it 5 stars.

reviews.name: Chris Nehou
reviews.text:
Tout ce qui est dit sur les points positifs est vrai : vue, cadre, propreté, etc.
Pour le négatif : baignade pas adaptée ici aux enfants.il faut aller sur une autre plage privée .
Ce n'est pas un hôtel.
Accueil expédié.
Service faible, peu efficace et  soucis de communication. Le petit déjeuner ne comprend pas le café ou le thé, ce qui est dit en fin de séjour, etc, etc.
Pour 3, la chambre est petite avec une petite penderie pour unique rangement
reviews.textTranslated:
Everything said about the positives is true: view, setting, cleanliness, etc.

On the negative side: swimming here is not suitable for children; you have to go to another private beach.

This is not a hotel. Check-in was rushed. Service was poor, inefficient, and there were communication problems. Breakfast doesn't include coffee or tea, which is only mentioned at the end of the stay, etc., etc.
For three people, the room is small with a tiny wardrobe as the only storage space.

We hebben een heerlijke tijd gehad bij Villa Juna in Sarandë! 🌞
De accommodatie is mooi, netjes en schoon. Alles is goed verzorgd en de eigenaren zijn ontzettend lieve en gastvrije mensen, waardoor je je direct thuis voelt.

De villa ligt de zee, wat extra fijn was. Het centrum is niet op loopafstand, maar wij gingen steeds met onze persoonlijke taxi en dat werkte ideaal. Zo konden we snel in het centrum zijn.
reviews.textTranslated:
We had a wonderful time at Villa Juna in Sarandë! 🌞

The accommodation is beautiful, tidy, and clean. Everything is well taken care of, and the owners are incredibly sweet and hospitable people, making you feel right at home immediately.

The villa is located by the sea, which was an added bonus. The center is not within walking distance, but we always took our personal taxi, and that worked perfectly. This allowed us to get to the center quickly.

reviews.text: Lugar super tranquilo y muy bonito para tomar una copa por la noche con vistas al mar. Unos metros apartado del paseo principal lo que le da un toque de chillout perfecto. De los que he visto, el mejor sitio de todo el paseo.
reviews.textTranslated: A super quiet and beautiful spot for an evening drink with sea views. It's a few meters away from the main promenade, giving it a perfect chill-out vibe. Of all the places I've seen, it's the best along the entire promenade.

reviews.name: Peter Tvåmeter
reviews.text: Vi gick till denna bar då vi gillade atmosfären och trodde att det skulle vara ett bra ställe. Men personalen bestod av vad som såg ut som en familj, där barnen som inte var gamla blandade drinkar och en man som var stressig och otrevlig tog emot oss. Det var få gäster på stället men han var på oss direkt och var hård och irriterad utan anledning. Vi letade på menyn och han kom igen och ville vi skulle beställa. Han tog fel på ordern och vi fick stoppa honom. Han skulle göra en söt drink och en frozen strawberry decary men det som kom var en "Black jocker" som smakade spya, det är verkligen inte så att vi är känsliga, vi har druckit både starka och lite konstiga drinkar, men denna tar priset, eller sistaplatsen. Den andra drinken var blaskig, vet inte hur de misslyckas så totalt med drinkarna men vårt råd är att undvika detta stället om du gillar drinkar, för att inte tala om otrevlig och värdelös setvice. Inte ofta jag skriver ett så dåligt omdöme så tro mig, undvik detta stället och tro inte på de många 5 stjärnorna som det på någpt konstigt sätt har fått.
reviews.textTranslated: We went to this bar because we liked the atmosphere and thought it would be a good place. But the staff consisted of what looked like a family, where the children who were not old mixed drinks and a man who was stressed and unpleasant welcomed us. There were few guests in the place but he was on us straight away and was harsh and irritated for no reason. We looked at the menu and he came again and wanted us to order. He got the order wrong and we had to stop him. He was supposed to make a sweet drink and a frozen strawberry decaf but what came was a "Black joker" that tasted like vomit, it's really not that we are sensitive, we have drunk both strong and a little strange drinks, but this one takes the prize, or last place. The second drink was bland, don't know how they fail so completely with the drinks but our advice is to avoid this place if you like drinks, not to mention the unpleasant and useless service. It's not often I write such a bad review so believe me, avoid this place and don't believe the many 5 stars it has somehow strangely received.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
First of all we feel very sorry that you felt this way at our bar , cause we give our  maximum so everyone leaves from us satisfied and happy . About the waiter’s behaviour it must have been a misunderstanding , as he always gives all the best to clients. As for the cocktail we are surprised to see such comment as you two perfectly finished them. But anyway if there was sth wrong you could have let us know at the moment. 
At last but not least all our reviews are from our clients that had enjoy every sip of drink here , and the time they spent at our place. Those clients who know how to enjoy and return every night. And not go to the bars to give  one star points only . So thank you for your opinion .

title: Santa Quaranta "Premium Resort"
description: Warm rooms in a genteel seaside property offering a pool & dining, plus free breakfast & Wi-Fi.
hotelDescription:
In a grand whitewashed building on the Ionian Sea, this polished hotel along the SH 81 state road is a 7-minute walk from Mango Beach, and 5 km from the hilltop ruins of Kalaja e Lëkurësit castle.
 Warmly decorated, understated rooms come with sea views, free Wi-Fi and smart TVs, as well as minibars; some have balconies. Family rooms sleep up to 4 guests, while upgraded rooms add sitting areas and hip, vintage-inspired furnishings.
 A breakfast buffet, parking and the use of sunloungers are complimentary. Other amenities include an outdoor pool, and an airy restaurant with a terrace.

The prices are reasonable, although quite high for Albania. Unfortunately, the entire center of Saranda isn't cheap. If we ever visit Saranda again, we'll definitely be back :). I recommend it.

reviews.name: Brenda G
reviews.text:
We stumbled across Hidden Lounge one evening while walking back to our apartment near Zero Zero Beach in Sarandë, and it quickly became one of our favorite spots. The rooftop setting overlooking the Ionian Sea is beautiful, especially in the evening with the boats in the harbor and the relaxed atmosphere all around. The night we first visited, locals were gathered watching sports on the big screen while everyone enjoyed drinks in a casual, comfortable setting that immediately made us feel welcome.

The next morning we came back for breakfast and were really impressed. We had the Albanian breakfast with eggs, sausage, toast, tomatoes, and cucumbers, and everything was fresh and delicious. I also had the fruit and yogurt topped with honey and granola, which was excellent along with fresh squeezed orange juice and coffee.

We ended up returning again a few days later because it’s simply a great place to slow down, enjoy breakfast, sip coffee, and watch the boats leaving the harbor. Relaxed atmosphere, friendly service, great views, and good food. Hidden Bistro became part of our daily routine while staying in Sarandë, and we would definitely come back again.

reviews.name: Rob G
reviews.text: 3rd time here. It is right around the corner for us - zero zero beach. Like other Albanian restaurants it's the people that make this place great. The way they decorated is beautiful and relaxing with tables and lounge areas, and a view of the sea. It's all open but the use of umbrellas give you ample shade. The breeze from the Ionian Sea is refreshing. The food is excellent as well. I like the Albanian breakfast. Today for breakfast we got to sea massive tuna being packaged and shipped for Tirana. There is never a full moment in Sarandë. I definitely recommend the Hidden Bistro any time of the day. Our first time here they had 2 big screens to watch football, so it is definitely a great place to hang out with friends.

Fomos atendidos por um garoto novo muito simpático e logo o atendimento passou para outro garçom.

O atendimento do garçom precisa de polimento, parecia que ele estava fazendo um grande favor em explicar o cardapio pra gente.

Comida saborosa, comi o peixe do dia, estava saboroso porem não acompanha guarnição.

Do cardápio inteiro havia 2 tipos de peixe,na verdade tinha macarrao e peixe. Era isso, não pedi sobremesa.
Deve ser porque é começo de alta temporada, porém é um restaurante ao lado do porto que quase não tinha peixe.
O restaurante tem um sinal de não fumar
na mesa mas as pessoas desrespeitam e fumam mesmo assim e ninguém fala nada.
reviews.textTranslated:
We were served by a very friendly young man, and then another waiter quickly took over.

The waiter's service needs polishing; it seemed like he was doing us a huge favor by explaining the menu to us.

The food was tasty; I had the fish of the day, which was delicious but didn't come with a side dish.

From the entire menu, there were only two types of fish; actually, there was pasta and fish. That was it; I didn't order dessert.

It must be because it's the beginning of high season, but it's a restaurant next to the port, which hardly had any fish.

The restaurant has a no-smoking sign on the tables, but people disregard it and smoke anyway, and nobody says anything.

reviews.name: Antonia Grabowski
reviews.text: Sehr nette und kundige Besitzerin. Sie hat uns beraten wann der beste Zeitpunkt ist, um mit den SUPs aufs Wasser zu gehen. Sie ist auch gemeinsam mit uns rausgefahren und hat uns angeleitet, da wir unerfahren waren. Wir haben uns sehr gut aufgehoben gefühlt und schnell Erfolge erzielt. Die Besitzerin hat uns außerdem Wetbags zur Verfügung gestellt, sodass wir unser Handy mitnehmen & Fotos machen konnten. Danke für diese tolle Erfahrung und die tollen Tipps 💛
reviews.textTranslated: A very friendly and knowledgeable owner. She advised us on the best time to go out on the water with the SUPs. She also went out with us and guided us, as we were inexperienced. We felt very well looked after and quickly made progress. The owner also provided us with wet bags so we could take our phones and take photos. Thank you for this great experience and the fantastic tips! 💛

reviews.name: Paul B
reviews.text: War mit meiner Freundin das erste Mal bei nem Paddelboard-Verleih – und es war echt klasse. Die Inhaberin war super nett, total zuvorkommend und echt hilfsbereit. Wir hatten richtig Spaß, obwohl wir beide keine Ahnung hatten. Die Erklärung war top, dann ging’s auch schon los. Können wir wirklich jedem empfehlen, der in Saranda, Albanien, Urlaub macht – egal ob Anfänger oder nicht. Lohnt sich auf jeden Fall! 💯
reviews.textTranslated: My girlfriend and I went to a paddleboard rental place for the first time – and it was fantastic! The owner was super nice, incredibly accommodating, and really helpful. We had a blast, even though neither of us had any experience. The explanation was excellent, and then we were off! We can highly recommend it to anyone vacationing in Saranda, Albania – whether you're a beginner or not. It's definitely worth it! 💯

reviews.name: Joanna Czerwinska
reviews.text:
Mega przygoda. To były nasze pierwsze kroki na deskach SUP, instruktorka Magda wszystko dokładnie wytłumaczyła i pokazała. Deski okazały się być strzałem w 10 , bawiliśmy się świetnie.
Bardziej dziękujemy Magdzie za miło spędzony czas i cierpliwość. Wrócimy niebawem 🥰
reviews.textTranslated:
A fantastic adventure. These were our first steps on SUP boards, and instructor Magda explained and demonstrated everything thoroughly. The boards turned out to be a perfect match, and we had a blast.

We'd like to thank Magda for the wonderful time we spent together and for her patience. We'll be back soon 🥰

reviews.name: Asia Górniak
reviews.text: Świetnia wypożyczalnia 😊 Cała organizacja na bardzo wysokim poziomie, sprzęt nowoczesny, zadbany i profesjonalny. Szczególne podziękowania dla Magdy, była przemiła, wszystko dokładnie wytłumaczyła i dała bardzo cenne wskazówki, które nam się przydały, szczególnie, że byliśmy początkujący. Czuliśmy się pewnie i bezpiecznie, a do tego super atmosfera od samego początku! Polecam każdemu, kto chce aktywnie i przyjemnie spędzić czas 💛
reviews.textTranslated: A great rental company 😊 The entire organization was top-notch, with modern, well-maintained, and professional equipment. Special thanks to Magda; she was incredibly kind, explained everything thoroughly, and gave us valuable tips that were very helpful, especially as beginners. We felt confident and safe, and the atmosphere was fantastic from the very beginning! I recommend them to anyone who wants to have an active and enjoyable time 💛
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Asia, thank you very much for your 5 star review.  We truly appreciate your support and are delighted that you had a great experience with us. We hope to see you soon again! 🤗

🩷🌊🏄🏻☀️

Hello Sachini. 
Thank you very much for your review. It was a great pleasure to meet and chat with you. We are glad that you enjoyed your time on the water, you did a great job on the kayak and a SUP. I hope to see you soon again! 🩷☀️🤗🌊🏄🏻🚣‍♀️

reviews.name: Вера Шевченко

updatesFromCustomers.text:
The best bar in Saranda!
Susan is a wonderful and welcoming host who truly makes you feel at home. Her bar is a calm and friendly place that radiates hospitality. You can enjoy a drink in a relaxed atmosphere, sing your heart out during karaoke nights, or challenge your friends to a game of darts on an excellent Winmau Blade 6 dartboard. And even better — a dartboard light has already been ordered! Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Eeva Louhio
reviews.text: I was in Saranda last month and Buzz Bar had Taco Tuesday! The two young women working at the bar were lovely, one of them was Finnish like us and made us the best veggie tacos I've ever eaten. She was also very helpful about information about Saranda. Sure to go back there again.

reviews.name: Robin Heitland
reviews.text: The Vibe & Food: "The Buzz Bar is a total gem! The atmosphere is lively yet cozy. Both expats and locals. We have had the tacos (vegan, vegetarian, and beef) on Taco Tuesday and Chicken Curry on Game Night and it was absolutely phenomenal—all homemade, perfectly prepared and bursting with flavor. You can taste the love! It is the best food we've had since arriving two weeks ago! If you're lucky Helen will have homemade brownies, they are so worth it.

reviews.name: Claire Healey
reviews.text: A wonderful bar, with a wonderful host. Thank you so much Susan, see you next time!

reviews.name: Meagan Elliott
reviews.text: Helen the owner is amazing! Affordable and lovely drinks. Had a lovely atmosphere and lots to do ! It was a different theme every night full of amazing people from different countries. We are from the uk and spent every night of our holiday here

reviews.name: Rebecca Jolly
reviews.text: 10/10!! Came to Sarandë for 3 nights and so happy to have found Helen at Buzz Bar! Amazing fun, friendly people… a real great bar ❤️❤️

reviews.name: Michal
reviews.text:
Fantastic bar with an incredibly warm and welcoming atmosphere—you can be sure you’ll be treated like a regular from the moment you walk in. The service is easily the best in Sarandë. The owner is from Australia, so communication is effortless and it’s great to have a friendly chat.

There’s darts and various games available, which makes it a fun place to hang out. It’s also worth checking their Facebook page, as they organize interesting events every day—we happened to catch a special offer with 100 lek off every drink.

They accept card payments, which is quite rare in Albania. I had a great evening there with amazing people and would highly recommend it!

reviews.name: Brad Foley
reviews.text: The best bar in Sarande Susan is great

reviews.name: Helen Avaient
reviews.text: Fun times can be found at The Buzz!

reviews.name: Lily Indradjaja
reviews.text: The Buzz Bar has a large selection of well-priced drinks, but it’s so much more than just a bar. The lovely and super friendly Aussie owner Helen has built such an active and engaging community, there are various activities organised most days / nights - taco Tuesday, trivia Friday, pot luck lunch every last Saturday of the month, karaoke  (officially Saturday night but unofficially anytime you feel like singing 😁). Check out their program on site or on their instagram @thebuzzbarsaranda, and drop by for a drink or two (or ten 😄). Whether you’re looking for a quiet drink or some friends you’re sure to find something that leaves a lasting impression! 😊

reviews.name: Sheri Johnson
reviews.text:
I don't go to bars, like, ever. I think I spent half of my time in Sarande at The Buzz Bar. The staff and customers are so friendly and welcoming, you would think I was Norm at Cheers. The drinks are plentiful and so inexpensive that you can just keep them coming (along with the fun!). The food is even better, from the Tuesday Tacos to the chicken curry to the homemade cinnamon rolls and brownies. We didn't miss a Friday Night Trivia and had a blast every time.

Helen has created a special corner of the world here that invites and welcomes the wanderers of that world. You might go in for just a drink or a bite to eat, but you will quickly become a part of the community. I liked my time in Sarande, but I loved my time at the Buzz Bar.

The staff is welcoming, and the place is perfect for a sweet treat after a stroll through town or along the beach. I highly recommend this place to anyone visiting Sarande.

reviews.text:
Today I stopped by this café to get a tea to go for a walk. I moved nearby 6 months ago and had actually been looking forward to this place opening after the renovation, hoping it would become a café where I could come and work regularly.

Unfortunately, my experience was very disappointing. I wanted to pay by card, but the employee at the counter told me they would not accept card payment for an order worth only 1€ and then simply walked away.

The minimum card payment itself was not the main issue. I understand cafés can have such rules. The problem was the dismissive attitude. In the end, I waited for another staff member and ordered 2 additional drinks just to reach the 500 lek minimum.

I ended up spending about 5 times more than planned, but the way the situation was handled left such a bad impression that I no longer feel like coming back.

ownerUpdates.text:
Gold Coffee Shop is one of the best places to relax in Saranda. Located near the beautiful Albanian Riviera, it offers excellent coffee, fresh drinks, and a friendly atmosphere for locals and tourists.

If you are looking for a coffee break while exploring Saranda, Gold Coffee Shop is a perfect stop. Visitors can enjoy espresso, cappuccino, fresh juices and tasty snacks in a comfortable and welcoming space.

Many tourists searching for the best coffee in Saranda or a relaxing coffee shop near the beach often choose Gold Coffee Shop. With great service, quality drinks and a pleasant environment, it has become a favorite place for visitors exploring the city.

Whether you are starting your morning with a strong espresso or relaxing in the afternoon with friends, Gold Coffee Shop is a great place to experience coffee culture in Saranda.

there is absolutely no “overcharging foreigners.” €20 for a sunbed is in line with the area and the services we provide. We clearly told you the price, and it was your decision whether to stay or not. If you didn’t agree with it, you were free to leave and choose another place.


There is no overcharging—everyone is treated the same. We stand by our service and do not accept false accusations about our staff.

As for our staff, we do not tolerate disrespect toward guests, and your claims about their behavior are simply not accurate. We always aim to create a positive and welcoming environment, and many of our guests appreciate this.

We find it unfair to make such statements and encourage future guests to judge based on their own experience.

reviews.text:
Uma das poucas empresas de transporte entre Saranda e Corfu.
Dá para comprar os bilhetes online, sem problemas. Um pouco caro para a qualidade do serviço. Mas toda a viagem decorreu com tranquilidade e foi organizada. Aconselho a comprar com alguma antecedência. Por vezes horários mais concorridos podem estar esgotados na véspera. Aconselho a chegarem ao local da partida com pelo menos 30 min de antecedência para todo o processo de fronteira (embora seja algo simples)
reviews.textTranslated:
One of the few transport companies between Saranda and Corfu.
You can buy tickets online without any problems. A bit expensive for the quality of service. But the whole trip went smoothly and was well organized. I advise buying tickets in advance. Sometimes the busier times can be sold out the day before. I advise arriving at the departure point at least 30 minutes in advance for the entire border crossing process (although it's quite simple).

reviews.name: Escu Saaas
reviews.text: Aunque vayas a su oficina local del puerto .. te cobran, o almenos eso pretenden, los precios de billete de hidrofoii igual que en la web, a máximos de precios, aunque sea primera quincena de Mayo. Es decir… 35€/persona y trayecto. Consejo: ni discutais… “Faleminderit” y hasta luego Lucas, te vas a otra (por ejemplo ionianseaways que está al lado u otra que haya) y lo mismo, alguno te hará mejor precio, aunque sean 10€ por viaje. A nosotros nos salió por 30€ persona y trayecto.
reviews.textTranslated: Even if you go to their local office at the port, they charge you—or at least they try to—the same Hydrofoil ticket prices as on the website, at maximum prices, even if it's the first half of May. That is… €35 per person, each way. Advice: don't even bother arguing… "Faleminderit" and goodbye. Go to another company (for example, Ionianseaways, which is right next door, or any other) and you'll likely find a better price, even if it's just €10 per trip. Ours cost €30 per person, each way.

title: Saranda Promenade
searchString: things to do in Saranda Albania

updatesFromCustomers.text: Sitting on the rocks near Bougainville Bay , Saranda

reviews.name: Suzana Ravs (Nana)
reviews.text:
Saranda Promenade je živahna in prijetna obmorska promenada, idealna za sproščen sprehod ob morju. Ob poti se vrstijo številne kavarne, restavracije in lokali, ki ustvarjajo pravo mediteransko vzdušje. Pogled na morje in pristanišče je čudovit, posebej v večernih urah ob sončnem zahodu.
Promenada je srce mesta, kjer se zbirajo domačini in obiskovalci, zato vedno vlada prijetno in živahno vzdušje. Odlična lokacija za večerni sprehod, oddih ob kavi ali uživanje v obmorskem utripu Sarande. Priporočam obisk vsem, ki imajo radi sproščeno vzdušje ob morju.
reviews.textTranslated: Saranda Promenade is a lively and pleasant seaside promenade, ideal for a relaxed walk by the sea. Along the way, there are numerous cafes, restaurants and bars, creating a true Mediterranean atmosphere. The view of the sea and the port is wonderful, especially in the evening at sunset. The promenade is the heart of the city, where locals and visitors gather, so there is always a pleasant and lively atmosphere. A great location for an evening walk, a break with a coffee or enjoying the seaside vibe of Saranda. I recommend a visit to everyone who likes a relaxed atmosphere by the sea.

title: ALBANIA MINIVANS TOURS

updatesFromCustomers.text: The tour guide is very kind and patient, with excellent driving skills and will not feel car sickness. Very patient to introduce the history and local knowledge of the scenic spot, and recommend local specialty drinks. Highly recommended! Great value for money!

reviews.name: Payal Amit
reviews.text:
Great experience with Albanian Mini Van Tours! I took the tour on Monday, 18th May from Saranda Promenade, and it was absolutely amazing. The tour covered all the famous nearby places, especially the Blue Eye and the castle, which were truly stunning and unforgettable.

Our tour guide was exceptional. He explained everything in detail about Albania’s history, lifestyle, famous places, food culture, and much more. He was knowledgeable, clear in his explanations, very helpful, and always willing to answer questions.

The entire trip was very comfortable, well organized, and excellent value for money. I had an amazing time and also learned a lot about Albania throughout the journey. They also dropped us at the Ksamil bus station on time, which was very convenient.

Highly recommend Albanian Mini Van Tours to anyone visiting the area. A great experience with comfort, learning, and beautiful places all in one tour!

reviews.textTranslated:

This is the only way."

Finally, they left us from 9:30 AM to 5:00 PM with only a Coca-Cola, which wasn't Coca-Cola. The service was poor, which was a shame because the boat was very nice.

Le personnel à bord est absolument fantastique : attentif, souriant et toujours prêt à aider. On se sent vraiment pris en charge et choyé du début à la fin.

Et la nourriture ! C'était tout simplement divin. Chaque plat était un vrai délice. J'ai tout mangé, il n'est rien resté dans mon assiette. Un vrai régal !

Pour avoir vu les autres bateaux qui partent, je peux dire sans hésiter que celui-ci est le meilleur. Le confort, le service et l'ambiance n'ont rien à voir.

Merci pour cette journée mémorable. J'ai hâte de revenir !
reviews.textTranslated:
I can only recommend this boat company. From the very beginning, the experience was fantastic, especially thanks to Jessica, who sold me my ticket with great professionalism and remarkable kindness.

The staff on board is absolutely fantastic: attentive, cheerful, and always ready to help. You truly feel taken care of and pampered from start to finish.

And the food! It was simply divine. Every dish was a true delight. I ate everything; nothing was left on my plate. A real treat!

Having seen the other boats departing, I can say without hesitation that this one is the best. The comfort, service, and atmosphere are second to none.

Thank you for a memorable day. I can't wait to come back!

I rented a car from Leka Tours for my stay in Saranda. I spent a long time looking for a reliable rental agency and I finally found them. Honestly, I'm thrilled. The cars they offered were all spotless, and their professionalism was immediately apparent upon arrival.

If you're looking to rent a car in Saranda or Ksamil, I highly recommend them.

As an added bonus, their agency is just a two-minute drive from the port. After dropping off the car to head to the port, the gentleman offered to drive us there free of charge, which we gladly accepted, even with just three small suitcases and a backpack. 😅

Thank you so much! 🙏

Unfortunately, we had already ordered our Aperol, which cost 900 Lek (just imagine: 9 Euros!), and was even mixed with still water. Overall, we had a wonderful stay and would happily return.

reviews.name: David Croffet
reviews.text: Very nice view but I don't get the high rating. Bedsheets were not clean on our arrival. Food in the restaurant was in comparison to other albanian restaurants bellow average which made us eat somewhere else most of the time. The surrounding area of this accomendation is not nice. It is a 15min drive to Sarande and all the restaurants. I was dissapointed and I would go again.

reviews.name: Pep Ferreiro
reviews.text:
Como la mayoría de alojamientos de este viaje tiene margen de mejora. La barrera del idioma no ayuda. No tiene recepción al uso, en el bar de abajo del todo te piden el pago, en efectivo mejor claro y ya. 5 pisos abajo,sin ascensor.

Nos pusieron literalmente al lado de la cocina, que ni tiene extractor. Además la habitación olía bastante a humedad aunque estaba muy limpia y por suerte solo la utilizamos de base para dormir.

La zona está apartada del centro, en parte bueno porque no parece el tan abarrotado Sarande, aunque no haya ningún comercio alrededor y dudo que llegue el transporte. La situación del local está literalmente encima del mar. El desayuno es correcto aunque no te dan a elegir.
reviews.textTranslated:
Like most accommodations on this trip, it has room for improvement. The language barrier doesn't help. There's no traditional reception; they ask for payment at the bar at the very bottom of the hall—cash is preferable, of course. It's five floors down, with no elevator.

They put us literally next to the kitchen, which doesn't even have an extractor fan. The room also smelled quite musty, although it was very clean, and luckily we only used it as a base for sleeping.

The area is away from the center, which is partly good because it doesn't feel like the overcrowded Sarande, although there are no shops nearby and I doubt public transport reaches it. The location is literally right on the sea. Breakfast is adequate, although they don't offer a choice.

reviews.text:
On ne pourrait pas qualifier la ville de petite perle de l’Adriatique. C'est un peu la pagaille, pas forcément propre, pas forcément pratique, mais la municipalité a tenter de miser sur cette courte promenade en front de mer pour égayer votre séjour sur place. La vue est jolie, l'eau claire même si sa couleur est soutenue par du sable blanc apporté à grand renfort de camions.
Petit souvenir du temps où l'urbanisme n'était pas pensé que pour soutirer de l'argent aux touristes, les restes d'architecture en bord de mer. Peut être byzantines mais il n'y a pas de panneau.
reviews.textTranslated: You wouldn't exactly call the town a little gem of the Adriatic. It's a bit chaotic, not particularly clean, not particularly convenient, but the municipality has tried to capitalize on this short seafront promenade to brighten up your stay. The view is pretty, the water clear, even if its color is enhanced by white sand brought in by a large number of trucks. A small reminder of a time when urban planning wasn't solely focused on extracting money from tourists: the remains of architecture along the seafront. Perhaps Byzantine, but there's no signpost.

title: Saranda Palace
description: Down-to-earth quarters in an unpretentious hotel featuring a pool & direct beach access.
hotelDescription:
Set off Rruga Ismali Qemali road, this modest hotel overlooking the sea is 14 minutes by foot from the port, and 5 km from the hilltop Lëkurësi Castle.
 The relaxed rooms and suites come with complimentary Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs, minibars, and balconies; some feature sea views.
 There's an outdoor pool with sunloungers, in addition to direct access to the beach.

updatesFromCustomers.text: Saranda Albania di sera i ristoranti bellissimi sul lungomare

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Great view, Quiet, Kid-friendly, Great value

reviews.name: Cherisse Vandenhoek
reviews.text:
Check-in at Saranda Palace was smooth and we were able to drop our bags early. However, there’s no secure luggage room, so keep that in mind.
The hotel has quite strict rules regarding towels and outside food/drinks. They only gave us one keycard for two people, which was annoying because the air conditioning only works with the card in the slot.
The room itself was fine but smaller than expected, with plenty of storage. Unfortunately there were some issues: no hooks for towels in the bathroom, a broken shower head, and a very loud fan. Housekeeping was thorough but used a lot of bleach — the strong chemical smell was noticeable throughout the day.
Beach access wasn’t set up yet, so only pool loungers were available. Poolside cocktails are pre-made mixers.
Breakfast was extremely disappointing — basically inedible. Orange-flavoured croissants, cold French toast, and very average eggs.
The front desk receptionist was quite rude, not welcoming, and didn’t take feedback well at all.
Overall, the hotel has potential with its location but felt poorly managed with several basic issues. Would not recommend in its current state.

reviews.name: Dritan Hidri
reviews.text:
Hotel situato in una posizione fantastica, nel cuore di Saranda, con una vista meravigliosa su Corfù che rende tutto ancora più speciale. La camera era pulita, curata e molto confortevole. Il vero punto di forza però è stato il ristorante: cena semplicemente eccezionale, pesce freschissimo cucinato alla perfezione e sapori davvero incredibili. Ogni piatto era preparato con grande attenzione e si sentiva la qualità degli ingredienti.
Anche il servizio è stato impeccabile: staff gentile, professionale e sempre disponibile, ci hanno fatto sentire accolti dall’inizio alla fine. Abbiamo trascorso una serata bellissima e indimenticabile in famiglia. Consiglio vivamente questo hotel sia per soggiornare che per cenare. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
reviews.textTranslated:
The hotel is in a fantastic location, in the heart of Saranda, with a wonderful view of Corfu that makes everything even more special. The room was clean, well-maintained, and very comfortable. The real highlight, however, was the restaurant: the dinner was simply exceptional, with fresh fish cooked to perfection and truly incredible flavors. Each dish was prepared with great care, and you could taste the quality of the ingredients.
The service was also impeccable: the staff were kind, professional, and always available, making us feel welcomed from start to finish. We spent a beautiful and unforgettable evening with the family. I highly recommend this hotel for both a stay and a dinner. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Luxury, Great view, Romantic, Quiet, Kid-friendly, Great value

reviews.name: Kos Mustafa
reviews.text:
Esperienza semplicemente indimenticabile al Hotel Saranda Palace! La camera era stupenda: elegante, super accogliente, impeccabilmente pulita e con ogni comfort necessario per sentirsi davvero coccolati.

Ma il vero spettacolo è stato il ristorante: qualcosa di straordinario. Ho vissuto una delle cene più buone della mia vita! Piatti eccezionali, curati alla perfezione e realizzati con ingredienti freschissimi e di altissima qualità. Il crudo era spettacolare, freschissimo e preparato in modo impeccabile: un’esplosione di sapori che mi ha conquistato dal primo assaggio.

Servizio eccellente, atmosfera meravigliosa e un’esperienza che consiglio a chiunque voglia concedersi un soggiorno speciale. Non vedo l’ora di tornare!
reviews.textTranslated:
A simply unforgettable experience at the Hotel Saranda Palace! The room was gorgeous: elegant, incredibly welcoming, impeccably clean, and equipped with every comfort you need to feel truly pampered.

But the real show was the restaurant: something extraordinary. I had one of the best dinners of my life! Exceptional dishes, perfectly prepared and made with the freshest, highest-quality ingredients. The raw fish was spectacular, incredibly fresh, and impeccably prepared: an explosion of flavors that won me over from the first bite.

Excellent service, a wonderful atmosphere, and an experience I recommend to anyone looking for a special stay. I can't wait to return!

From the moment you arrive, you're treated to one of the most stunning views around—open, beautiful, and incredibly relaxing, whether by day or at sunset. The food is even better: fresh, flavorful, generously portioned, and beautifully presented, with every dish we tried exceeding expectations. Paired with warm, attentive, and genuinely friendly service that made us feel right at home, it’s the perfect spot to unwind and enjoy great meals. If you’re looking for outstanding food, excellent service, and a fantastic atmosphere, Cafe Bar Relax is a must-visit—we’ll definitely be back soon! Highly recommended!

reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Dzięki I do zobaczenia ❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️

reviews.name: Michele Rossi
reviews.text: I wanted a nice hearty breakfast to start my day of adventures and LuLu Cafe was the perfect stop - especially if you are a cat lover! The service was amazing and the food was even better! They do take credit card (with additional fee). Stop by, have a great meal and get some kitty time!

reviews.name: Romain Ren
reviews.text:
Le meilleur café de la ville !!!

On y a pris le petit-déjeuner à 2 reprises : c'était excellent à chaque fois. Les produits sont frais et récupérés localement et on sent que les plats sont préparés avec amour et soin.

Les prix sont légèrement au-dessus de la moyenne, mais ils en valent largement la peine au vu de la qualité. Je recommande personnellement les crêpes et les omelettes.

La serveuse est très agréable et accueillante. Une bouteille d'eau est offerte avec chaque petit-déjeuner, très pratique pour les touristes et le café offre chaque jour une boisson fait maison différente.
reviews.textTranslated:
The best coffee shop in town!!!

We had breakfast there twice: it was excellent both times. The ingredients are fresh and locally sourced, and you can tell the dishes are prepared with love and care.

The prices are slightly above average, but they're well worth it considering the quality. I personally recommend the crepes and omelets.

The waitress is very pleasant and welcoming. A bottle of water is offered with every breakfast, which is very convenient for tourists, and the café offers a different homemade drink every day.

reviews.name: leszek bejmert
reviews.text:
Niespodzianka jest taka że do LuLu Cafe nie trzeba już wchodzić pod górkę... Lokal jest teraz w centrum Sarandy i wszędzie jest blisko. Byłem ze ślubną na kawie i podobało nam się tam bardzo.
Wspaniała atmosfera i rozmowa z Magdą która jest właścicielką tego lokalu sprawiła nam przyjemność.
Szczerze polecam.
reviews.textTranslated:
The surprise is that you no longer have to walk uphill to LuLu Cafe... The place is now in the center of Saranda and close to everything. I went there for coffee with my wedding guest and we really enjoyed it.

The wonderful atmosphere and conversation with Magda, the owner, were a pleasure.

I highly recommend it.

reviews.name: Mała Mi
reviews.text: Śniadaniowe pyszności skradły moje serce ❤️ owsianka z owocami to poezja smaku, tosty, omlety, sałatki, ciasto i coś na trawienie + miła pogawędka z rodakami dała efekt WOW. Serdecznie polecam, również na wieczorną kawkę czy drinka 👍
reviews.textTranslated: The breakfast delicacies stole my heart ❤️ The oatmeal with fruit was a feast of flavors, the toast, omelets, salads, cake, and something to help with digestion, plus the pleasant chat with my fellow countrymen, were a real WOW. I highly recommend it, even for an evening coffee or drink 👍

reviews.name: Marco Pesucci
reviews.text: Il cibo è delizioso, menomale un posto dove fare una colazione variegata e salutare anche fuori casa. Le ragazze al servizio molto gentili. Super consigliato!
reviews.textTranslated: The food is delicious, thank goodness for a place where you can have a varied and healthy breakfast even when you're away from home. The ladies serving are very kind. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Luana Vilhena
reviews.text: Lovely breakfast and atmosphere

title: Lungomare,Sarandë
searchString: things to do in Saranda Albania

reviews.name: Hunter Pignatelli
reviews.text: Lungomare vivo pimpante , pieno di attrazioni fantastici ristoranti e lounge bar vista mare, ma anche con locali meno impegnativi per cocktail o gelati take away! È bellissimo passeggiarci a qualunque ora giorno pomeriggio o sera. Ci sono anche negozi per shopping o bancarelle con souvenir.
reviews.textTranslated: A lively, vibrant seafront, full of attractions, fantastic restaurants, and lounge bars overlooking the sea, as well as less fancy places for cocktails or take-away ice cream! It's beautiful to stroll along at any time of day, afternoon or evening. There are also shops and souvenir stalls.

reviews.name: Antonio Oliveto
reviews.text: Bellissimo, spazioso, affacciato sul mare e di nuova costruzione con tanti localini e negozietti
reviews.textTranslated: Beautiful, spacious, overlooking the sea and newly built with many little shops and cafes

reviews.textTranslated: A lovely stroll along this seafront after dining at a local restaurant. Parking is a bit of a hassle because the area is very busy.

reviews.name: Domenico
reviews.text: Lungomare spettacolare! Pieno di ristoranti e pub ,luci ovunque , giri notturni in barca ,e tanto altro,tutto da scoprire !
reviews.textTranslated: Spectacular waterfront! Full of restaurants and pubs, lights everywhere, nighttime boat trips, and so much more to discover!
